name: agentic-runner
description: Agentic Runner control-plane for explicit cross-workflow routing, scoped assignments, handoff/resume, and audits across coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, and CodexVideo. Primary route: use only for explicit or supervised control-plane work. Fallback: leaf workflows own single-domain tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Explicit Agentic Runner control-plane routing for coding-agents, Agentic StructCiv, CodexVideo, handoff, resume, audit, and supervised assignments.
